metadata.description: Book authoring workflow skills for Claude Code. Systematize reference analysis, manuscript proofreading, diagram creation, style verification, and structure reorganization.

plugins.name: authorkit
plugins.description: Book authoring workflow skills (English). init(setup), analyze(analysis), compare(cross-reference), juice(to markdown), draft(proofreading), diagram(text block diagrams), review(verification), restructure(reorganization).

plugins.name: authorkit-ko
plugins.description: 책 집필 워크플로우 스킬 (한국어). init(초기 설정), analyze(분석), compare(대조), juice(md 변환), draft(퇴고), diagram(도해 제작), review(검증), restructure(구조 재배치)를 지원합니다.
